video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bayern Munich look to seize control at home, with Harry Kane, Jamal Musiala and Joshua Kimmich central to their ambitions. Real Madrid, though, arrive with belief and pedigree, leaning on the big‑game presence of Jude Bellingham, Vinícius Jr. and Rodrygo, as Antonio Rüdiger anchors the defence. Will Bayern power their way into the semi-finals, or can Madrid’s European composure prevail once again? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Arsenal return to the Emirates looking to take control, with Bukayo Saka, Martin Ødegaard and Declan Rice key to their push. Sporting CP arrive ready to test the hosts, inspired by Gyökeres, Pedro Gonçalves and Morten Hjulmand. Will the Gunners get the job done at home, or can Sporting spring a surprise? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
